scripts.test:coverage: pnpm generate && pnpm --dir ../server-state exec vitest run --root ../api-client --coverage --coverage.provider=custom --coverage.customProviderModule=../server-state/node_modules/@vitest/coverage-v8/dist/index.js --coverage.include=src/client.ts --coverage.include=src/errors.ts --coverage.include=src/index.ts --coverage.include=src/logging.ts --coverage.include=src/schema.ts --coverage.thresholds.lines=80 --coverage.thresholds.functions=80 --coverage.thresholds.branches=80 --coverage.thresholds.statements=80
